author: doll-agent
content:
Done. broadcast_binary materialized every (idx_a, idx_b) pair into a Vec before returning. The single caller iterates sequentially, so the intermediate allocation was pure overhead.

Replaced with a streaming BroadcastIter implementing Iterator + ExactSizeIterator. Correct size_hint preserves preallocation in downstream .collect(). Peak memory drops by N usize-pairs for broadcast outputs of size N.

Updated concat::add and 2 test sites. New broadcast_binary_iter_size_hint test pins the ExactSizeIterator contract.

ferray-strings: 146 -> 147 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 9ed727ec.
